explanation: The recommendation is explicitly about AWS Config aggregation and Security Hub CSPM central configuration, but its service scope lists only AWS Organizations. This omits the two services whose behavior the claim teaches and can misroute downstream lesson/question coverage.
required_action: Add AWS Config and AWS Security Hub CSPM to scope.services while retaining AWS Organizations if organization integration is intended scope.
suggested_revision: scope.services should include AWS Config, AWS Organizations, and AWS Security Hub CSPM.

supporting_source.locator: Multi-Account Multi-Region Data Aggregation for AWS Config > Use Cases and Note; paired with Security Hub CSPM central configuration documentation
supporting_source.title: Multi-Account Multi-Region Data Aggregation for AWS Config
